mechanisms.refresh: No — issue new JWT per request (certificate-based)

mechanisms.token_lifetime: Access: 2h; Refresh: until revoked or 90 days of non-use

mechanisms.notes: Do NOT use in production — no MFA support, less secure

authentication.recommended_flow: JWT Bearer for server-to-server; Web Server for user-context apps
authentication.my_domain: Required for OAuth endpoints (Spring '26+), use My Domain–specific endpoints over legacy generic domains

total_api_calls_daily.notes: Rolling 24-hour window. Shared across REST, SOAP, Bulk APIs. Monitor via /services/data/v66.0/limits

concurrent_long_running_requests.definition: Requests running >20 seconds count as long-running

timeout.query_calls: Governed by SOQL limits (typically 2 minutes for large queries)

core_endpoints.description: Composite: up to 25 subrequests (counts as 1 API call)
SObject Collections: up to 200 records per call
Get remaining API allocations for all limits

events: All standard/custom object changes via CDC

limits.cdc_events: Counts toward Platform Event delivery limit

error_dictionary.description: Request body malformed, invalid JSON/XML, or invalid field values
causes: Wrong field type (e.g., text in date field)
error_dictionary.solution: Log full request body and response. Validate payload against SObject describe. Check authentication payload format

error_dictionary.description: Session ID or OAuth token expired or invalid
causes: OAuth refresh token expired (>90 days non-use)
error_dictionary.solution: Re-authenticate. For JWT Bearer: issue new JWT. For Web Server: use refresh_token. Check user is active with API access enabled

error_dictionary.description: Request refused — resource not accessible to user
error_dictionary.solution: Check /limits endpoint for remaining allocations. Verify integration user has Read/Edit on all relevant objects and fields
Verify record ID, API version, and endpoint path

error_dictionary.description: Conflict with current resource state (e.g., API version incompatibility)
error_dictionary.solution: Check API version compatibility with the resource being accessed
Reduce SOQL query length, use composite/sobjects for batch operations instead of many query params

error_dictionary.description: Request was not conditional — missing If-Match or similar header
error_dictionary.solution: Add Conditional Request Headers (e.g., If-Match) to the request

error_dictionary.description: Daily API request limit or concurrent request limit exceeded
causes: Concurrent long-running request cap (25 production) reached
error_dictionary.solution: Use Composite API to batch calls (counts as 1). Cache reference data. Move bulk to Bulk API 2.0. Reduce polling frequency. Implement exponential backoff with jitter

error_dictionary.description: Salesforce temporarily throttling or server overload
error_dictionary.solution: Implement exponential backoff retry. Salesforce occasionally throttles — expect and handle 503s gracefully

community_constraints.issue: Username-Password flow deprecated but still widely used in old integrations
community_constraints.detail: Many legacy tutorials still use password flow; devs get 400 invalid_grant errors when passwords change or MFA is enabled
community_constraints.workaround: Migrate to JWT Bearer flow for server-to-server. Use Web Server flow with refresh tokens for user-context apps

community_constraints.issue: Hardcoding instance URLs instead of deriving from OAuth response
community_constraints.detail: Instance URLs (e.g., na1.salesforce.com) can change. Hardcoding them breaks integrations after org migration or sandbox refresh
community_constraints.workaround: Always use instance_url returned in OAuth token response as base for all API calls

community_constraints.issue: Mixing API versions across a single integration
community_constraints.detail: Different API versions may have different behaviors for the same endpoint
community_constraints.workaround: Stick to one API version per integration; upgrade deliberately and test all endpoints

community_constraints.issue: Bulk API 2.0 query job storage limit reached
community_constraints.detail: Daily storage for Bulk API 2.0 queries (measured in MB) can fill up with large result exports
community_constraints.workaround: Export results promptly. Delete completed query jobs to free storage. Use filters to reduce result set size

use_cases: Sync Leads/Contacts/Accounts between Salesforce and external CRM
Automate campaign member creation from email marketing platform
Real-time push of opportunity updates to billing/ERP systems
Create Cases from external support tickets with bi-directional sync
Sync custom objects between Salesforce and external data warehouses
